'''Yaeger Doru''' was a young [[Human/Legends|Human]] with a habit of biting his fingernails. He worked for [[House Hirskaala]]

In [[31 BBY/Legends|31 BBY]], head of security for Hirskaala [[Nim'Ri]] disappeared in order to join the [[Cularin resistance]], along with other seven people. Doru took over Nim'Ri's post.

==Appearances==
*{{LivingForce|Eye of the Sun: The Resistance Within}} {{1st}}
